headline: JPMorgan Sees Recovery Potential in Consumer Stocks During the Second Half of 2026
summary: Consumer Cyclicals Lag Behind Broader Market RallyJPMorgan believes a number of consumer-focused sectors could be positioned for a stronger second half of 2026 after a prolonged period of underperformance. According to strategist Mislav Matejka, consumer cyclicals have been one of the few major market segments to miss out on this year’s rally.

headline: Here’s the biggest driver of your Social Security check in 2026. Hint: it’s not when you claim
summary: The timing of your claim is important, but there is another lever that could be just as powerful at boosting your monthly benefits.
